areas.name: Community Centers
areas.context: Each community center operates with its own supervisor and assistant supervisors. Centers deliver drop-in programs, structured classes, and facility rentals.
key_considerations: Alcohol permit coordination for rentals [VERIFY BEFORE PUBLISHING]
areas.format_note: Opening and closing procedures are Format Type 1. Weather and emergency closure decisions are Format Type 2.

areas.name: Rockville Swim and Fitness Center
areas.context: The Swim and Fitness Center is the largest revenue-generating cost center in Recreation Facilities. It operates an indoor pool, outdoor recreation pool, and fitness center.
key_considerations: Maryland Department of Health pool licensing [VERIFY BEFORE PUBLISHING]
Lifeguard certification and recertification requirements [VERIFY BEFORE PUBLISHING]
Chemical handling and storage [VERIFY BEFORE PUBLISHING]
Water quality logs as legal records
areas.format_note: Emergency action plans are Format Type 2 (Decision-Support).

areas.name: Croydon Creek Nature Center
areas.context: Environmental education facility with live resident animals, outdoor programming, and a Native Plant Sale. Volunteer naturalists support programs.
common_processes: Weather hold protocols for outdoor programs
key_considerations: Animal welfare and state wildlife handling requirements [VERIFY BEFORE PUBLISHING — contact Maryland Department of Natural Resources]

areas.name: Civic Center Complex
key_roles: F. Scott Fitzgerald Theatre/Civic Center Supervisor
areas.context: The Civic Center Complex is one of the most operationally complex areas in the department. It encompasses the F. Scott Fitzgerald Theatre, Glenview Mansion, Social Hall, Elwood Smith Community Center, Pump House Community Center, park pavilion rentals, and community gardens at Woottons Mill Park. Theatre production, historic venue events, box office operations, and multi-use facility rentals all occur simultaneously under one management structure.
common_processes: Facility rental intake, contracts, and insurance certificate review
Theatre production coordination and stage management
Box office operations, ticket sales, and revenue reconciliation
Glenview Mansion event setup, breakdown, and historic structure protocols
Park pavilion and shelter reservation management
Community garden plot assignment and rules enforcement
ADA compliance review for all event and rental spaces
key_considerations: Insurance minimums for renters [VERIFY BEFORE PUBLISHING]
Glenview Mansion historic structure protocols [VERIFY BEFORE PUBLISHING — confirm any preservation requirements with Capital Projects]
Outdoor event noise and load-in restrictions
